data.title: Dow Jones Futures rise on Taiwan Semi, Goldman Sachs earnings, but gains reduce. ST: Stock market fades despite boosts in chips, banks.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market experienced a rally fueled by strong performances from Taiwan Semiconductor and Goldman Sachs. However, the gains were significantly reduced later on. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures responded positively to the news, with a focus on the strong showing by Taiwan Semi in the semiconductor sector and Goldman Sachs in the banking sector. This update was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow Jones rises on surprise jobless claims, Nvidia's TSMC surges on earnings. Small caps lead.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase due to unexpected weekly jobless claims. Chipmaker Nvidia saw a surge in earnings, leading to a significant rise in TSMC stock. The stock market today witnessed gains fading for indexes while small caps took the lead. Several breakouts cooled off during this period of live coverage.

data.title: A. O. Smith declares quarterly dividend of $0.36 per share on Common Stock and Class A Common Stock. Payable on Feb. 17.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, the board members of A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE: AOS) announced a standard quarterly cash dividend of $.36 per share for both the company's Common Stock and Class A Common Stock. This dividend will be distributed on February 17 to shareholders who are listed on record...

data.title: TAL™ launches Valentine's Day collection of water bottles and wine tumblers exclusively for Walmart in NYC.
data.description: Launching in New York on January 15, 2026, TAL™ introduces a line of double-insulated drinkware featuring playful designs like pink candy hearts and red hearts. Ideal for both special occasions and daily use, these stylish products are not only fun but also practical. TAL™ offers hydration solutions that are not only chic but also budget-friendly.

data.title: FG Imperii Acquisition Corp. prices $200M initial public offering with 20M units at offering price.
data.description: Itasca, Illinois - On January 15, 2026, FG Imperii Acquisition Corp. revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The newly established special purpose acquisition company, based in the Cayman Islands, priced 20,000,000 units at a specific offering price.

data.title: Cyndi Lauper to headline beachfront concert at Atlantis Paradise Island on June 20, 2026. Paradise Island, Bahamas.
data.description: Iconic singer Cyndi Lauper delivered a high-energy performance at Atlantis Paradise Island in the Bahamas on January 15, 2026. The event, featuring her timeless hits, was a one-night-only affair that drew a large crowd to the premier Caribbean destination known for top-notch entertainment. Lauper's vibrant show left a lasting impression on the audience, showcasing her enduring talent and captivating stage presence.

data.title: Silvercorp Metals Inc. reports $126.1 million revenue in Q3 2026, 51% increase from Q3 2025. 1.9M oz silver produced.
data.description: Silvercorp Metals Inc. reported its production and sales figures for the third quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company saw a record revenue of approximately $126.1 million, marking a 51% increase from the same quarter in the previous year. Silver production was at 1.9 million ounces, representing a 4% decrease, while silver equivalent production stood at 2.0 million ounces (a 5% decrease). Lead production was at 16.4 million pounds (a 4% decrease), and zinc production increased by 5% to 7.0 million pounds. The company stockpiled 61,105 tonnes of ore for processing during the Chinese New Year. Exploration activities were ongoing at various mining districts, with significant drilling and tunneling work completed. Lower production numbers were attributed to maintenance of XRT sorter and increased dilution from shrinkage mining. Detailed operational results for the Ying Mining District and GC Mine were also provided, showing an increase in ore processed compared to the previous year, despite decreases in production levels for silver, lead, and zinc due to lower head grades and maintenance issues. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PG&E Corp. to report Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 12, 2026, 11:00am ET. Public access available.
data.description: In Oakland, California, on January 15, 2026, PG&E Corporation, traded on NYSE as PCG, announced a conference call scheduled for February 12, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. EST (8:00 a.m. PST) to review its financial performance for fourth quarter and full year of 2025. This call is open to the public for participation.

data.title: ALGO staking on Algorand soars by 57% in 2025, with 1.98B tokens staked. Community validators almost double as TVL sends mixed signals.
data.description: The December report for Algorand (ALGO) indicates a significant increase in staked ALGO, rising by 57% to a total of 1.98 billion tokens by the end of 2025. During the same period, the number of community validators almost doubled. However, the Total Value Locked (TVL) displayed mixed signals, suggesting a complex overall picture for the network's performance and user engagement.
Completion of FINAL LIFE Private Placement by Liberty raises $2.6M.

data.title: CNO Financial appoints Linda Gibson to board of directors, effective immediately. former CEO of PGIM Quantitative Solutions.
data.description: In Carmel, Indiana on January 15, 2026, CNO Financial Group (NYSE: CNO) disclosed the appointment of Linda Gibson as a Director by their board of directors. Gibson, the ex-Chairperson and CEO of PGIM Quantitative Solutions, will take on the role immediately.

data.title: Targa Resources Corp. announces quarterly dividend for Q4 2025. Stock symbol: TRGP. Earnings webcast scheduled.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) declared its quarterly dividend for common shares for the fourth quarter of 2025. This announcement signifies the company's commitment to shareholders by distributing profits. Targa's decision to release this dividend showcases its financial stability and potential growth, as well as its ability to provide returns to investors. This move highlights the company's strategic planning and dedication to maximizing shareholder value.

data.title: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. finishes $11.0 million subordinated debt offering, aiming to refinance debts.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, GBank Financial Holdings Inc disclosed the successful closure of a private placement of $11.0 million in total principal amount of 7.25% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2036. This move, announced by the parent company of GBank, aims to gather funds for various corporate needs, notably refinancing existing debts.

data.title: Martinrea International Inc. invests in Polyalgorithm Machine Learning Inc. by acquiring common shares in PolyML.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Martinrea International Inc. (TSX:MRE), a leading global automotive supplier specializing in Lightweight Structures and Propulsion Systems, disclosed its recent acquisition of common shares in Polyalgorithm Machine Learning Inc. (PolyML).
First Quantum Minerals revealed preliminary production figures for 2025 and guidance for 2026-2028.

data.title: Chicago Auto Show's 34th Charity Gala on Feb. 6 aiming to raise millions for 18 nonprofits, produced by CATA.
data.description: In Chicago, the 34th annual First Look for Charity gala at the Chicago Auto Show is set for Feb. 6, 2026, from 7-11 p.m. at McCormick Place. The event is organized by the Chicago Automobile Trade Association (CATA). This gala serves as a fundraiser for local charities and provides attendees with an exclusive preview of the auto show before it officially opens to the public.

data.title: Copilot by GitHub now has a cross-agent memory system in public preview, allowing AI assistants to learn and share knowledge across coding, CLI, and code review with users.
data.description: GitHub has introduced a new memory feature for Copilot agents, empowering AI assistants to absorb knowledge from previous interactions and exchange information within coding, command-line interface (CLI), and code review processes. This enhancement allows Copilot to leverage past experiences, enhancing its performance and efficiency.
